sessions.summary: Implemented Phase 2 - User UI Portal with RBAC authentication
key_actions: Extended AuthContext with Role-Based Access Control (admin, faculty, department)
Created UserSidebar component with user menu items
Created UserTopNav component with profile dropdown
Created UserDashboard - simplified stats for users
Created UserDocuments - folder navigation, upload, preview
Created UserRequests - request workflow with Browse Archive
Created UserBrowseArchive - department document browsing
Created UserSubmitRequest - request submission form
Created UserAACCUP - accreditation area management
Created UserNotifications - notification list
Created UserProfile - profile view/edit
Created UserSettings - preferences
Updated App.tsx with routing and role-based guards
Made Login page the landing page (root route /)
Fixed all TypeScript compilation errors

sessions.summary: Fixed random logout when switching tabs in user portal
key_actions: Identified root cause: route guards evaluated before auth state was restored from localStorage
Added isLoading check to AppRoutes component before evaluating route guards
Added !user null check to UserAppContent guard to prevent redirect during state initialization
Added !user null check to AppContent guard for consistency
Fixed guard condition from user?.role !== 'admin' to user.role === 'admin' with explicit !user check

bug_fixed.issue: Random logout when switching sidebar tabs
symptoms: Logout happened immediately on sidebar click
Both admin and faculty users affected
bug_fixed.root_cause: During navigation, React could briefly render with isAuthenticated=false or user=null before state was restored from localStorage, triggering redirect to /
bug_fixed.solution: Added isLoading state check in AppRoutes to wait for auth restoration before evaluating guards. Added explicit !user checks to prevent null pointer issues.
